name: Austin
description: Austin is the capital of Texas and one of the fastest-growing cities in the US, known for its tech industry and vibrant culture.

name: Denver
description: Denver, the Mile High City, is Colorado's capital and largest city, renowned for its proximity to the Rocky Mountains and booming real estate market.

name: Nashville
description: Nashville is Tennessee's capital and Music City, experiencing rapid population growth driven by a strong job market and relatively affordable housing.

name: Phoenix
description: Phoenix is Arizona's capital and the fifth-largest city in the US, offering warm weather, growing job opportunities, and relatively accessible home prices.

name: Charlotte
description: Charlotte is the largest city in North Carolina and a major financial center, offering a strong job market and some of the most affordable housing among major US metros.
